title: Docker Compose File Structure
content:
### Compose File Structure

A `docker-compose.yml` file has three top-level sections:

```yaml
services:   # application components (containers)
networks:   # network configuration
volumes:    # volume definitions
```

### Service Definition

Each service defines how a container is run:

```yaml
services:
  web:
    image: nginx:alpine
    build: .                    # build from Dockerfile in current dir
    ports:
      - "8080:80"
    volumes:
      - ./html:/usr/share/nginx/html
    depends_on:
      - api
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=production
    restart: unless-stopped
```

### Key Service Fields

| Field | Description |
|---|---|
| `image` | Image to use (from registry or local) |
| `build` | Path to Dockerfile (alternative to image) |
| `ports` | Port mappings (`"host:container"`) |
| `volumes` | Volume or bind mount mappings |
| `depends_on` | Startup dependencies between services |
| `environment` | Environment variables (list or map) |
| `restart` | Restart policy (no, always, unless-stopped, on-failure) |

### Healthcheck

Define a command to check if a service is healthy:

```yaml
services:
  web:
    image: nginx
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 10s
```

### Restart Policies

```yaml
services:
  app:
    restart: "no"              # never restart
    restart: always            # always restart
    restart: unless-stopped    # restart unless manually stopped
    restart: on-failure        # restart only on error
```
codeExample:
services:
  web:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "8080:80"
    depends_on:
      - db
    environment:
      DB_HOST: db
    restart: unless-stopped
  db:
    image: postgres:15
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: secret

volumes:
  pgdata:

quiz.question: Which field defines startup dependencies between services in a Compose file?
What are the three top-level sections in a Compose file?
